text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Perfect! Now for my drink!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Look, look! It's a new super
carbonated soda!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to drink it ASAP, so I just went full turbo
around the track to be as thirsty as possible!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, was the bottle this big and bulgy before?
Oh well, time to open it up and take a big swig!
